Name: PKO-Native Procedural Knowledge Rulebook
Description: A canonical Effortless Rulebook profile aligned to the Procedural Knowledge Ontology (PKO) 2.0.0. It represents procedure specifications separately from executions and includes versioning, status changes, steps, transitions, actions, software functions, tools, requirements, verifications, resources, agents, roles in time, issues, errors, questions, feedback, FAQs, explanations, governance, tacit/implicit/explicit knowledge capture, operational data bindings, learning, and communication policy projections. PKO-native terms are mapped exactly; enterprise knowledge-governance additions are explicitly identified as ERB-PKO extensions.

RulebookReleases.Description: Version ledger for the canonical ERB-PKO rulebook itself. This is distinct from PKO Procedure versioning.

schema.name: RulebookReleaseId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one RulebookReleases row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the RulebookReleases row.

schema.name: RulebookVersion
schema.Description: Semantic version of this canonical rulebook release.

schema.name: ProfileVersion
schema.Description: Version of the ERB-PKO profile schema.

schema.name: ProfileSchemaPath
schema.Description: Repository-relative path to the ERB-PKO JSON profile schema.

schema.name: PkoCoreVersionIri
schema.Description: Exact version IRI of the PKO core ontology used by this release.

schema.name: PkoIndustryVersionIri
schema.Description: Exact version IRI of the PKO industry module used by this release.

schema.name: IssuedAt
schema.Description: Timestamp at which this rulebook release was issued.

schema.name: Status
schema.Description: Release status such as Draft, Candidate, or Published.

schema.name: Changelog
schema.Description: Human-readable semantic changelog for this release.

schema.name: IsCurrent
schema.Description: TRUE only for the current rulebook release.

data.Changelog: Initial executable PKO-native canonical rulebook and projection-tool proof.

OntologyProfiles.Description: Versioned ontology and vocabulary dependencies. PKO mappings always identify the exact profile and version.

schema.name: OntologyProfileId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one OntologyProfiles row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the OntologyProfiles row.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: Human-readable ontology or vocabulary name.

schema.name: Version
schema.Description: Referenced release or specification version.

schema.name: VersionIri
schema.Description: Exact version IRI or normative specification URI.

schema.name: NamespaceIri
schema.Description: Namespace used for class/property IRIs.

schema.name: License
schema.Description: License or standards body attribution.

schema.name: Scope
schema.Description: How the profile is used in this rulebook.

data.Label: PKO Core
data.Scope: Core procedural knowledge: procedures, steps, executions, transitions, requirements, issues, feedback, and agents.

data.Label: PKO Industry
data.Scope: Industry extension for machines, sites, departments, PPE, locks, energy sources, and tools.

data.Label: P-Plan
data.Scope: Plan, Step, MultiStep, and plan/execution alignment.

data.Label: PROV-O
data.Scope: Agents, activities, entities, attribution, provenance, and execution time.

data.Label: DCMI Terms
data.Scope: Titles, descriptions, identifiers, dates, references, and lifecycle metadata.

data.Label: Publishing Roles Ontology
data.Scope: Roles and roles held during a period of time.

data.Label: ODRL
data.Scope: Policies, rules, assignee roles, duties, permissions, and prohibitions.

data.Label: ERB-PKO Enterprise Extension
data.Scope: Explicit extension for elicitation, tacit knowledge, governance, learning, operational bindings, and communication-channel policy.

EvaluationContexts.Description: The instant this rulebook's time-dependent witnesses are evaluated against. Modeled as data rather than wall-clock so every freshness, overdue, and validity answer is reproducible and auditable: asking the same question tomorrow yields the same answer. Exactly one row carries IsCurrent.

schema.name: EvaluationContextId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one EvaluationContexts row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the EvaluationContexts row.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: What this evaluation instant represents.

schema.name: AsOfInstant
schema.Description: The instant all time-dependent witnesses are evaluated against.

schema.name: IsCurrent
schema.Description: TRUE for the single active evaluation context.

schema.name: Rationale
schema.Description: Why this instant was chosen.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Extension class IRI.

data.Label: Post-close evaluation
data.Rationale: Shortly after the Q3 close execution and the policy notification run, so both procedure families have completed executions to witness against. Fixed as data so freshness and overdue answers are reproducible.

Organizations.Description: Organizations that own, adopt, govern, or execute procedures. Maps to prov:Organization.

schema.name: OrganizationId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Organizations row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Organizations row.

schema.name: DisplayName
schema.Description: Organization's human-readable name.

schema.name: OrganizationType
schema.Description: Type such as Company, Department, Vendor, or Regulator.

schema.name: ExternalIdentifier
schema.Description: Identifier in an operational directory or master-data system.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact RDF class IRI for the organization.

Agents.Description: Human and software agents that create, modify, approve, or execute procedural knowledge. Maps to prov:Agent.

schema.name: AgentId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Agents row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Agents row.

schema.name: DisplayName
schema.Description: Agent's human-readable name.

schema.name: AgentKind
schema.Description: Human, AIAgent, AutomatedPipeline, Organization, or another explicit agent category.

schema.name: Organization
schema.Description: Organization to which the agent belongs.

schema.name: ContactAddress
schema.Description: Contact address when applicable.

schema.name: VersionOrEmploymentKey
schema.Description: Model version, pipeline release, or employment assignment key.

schema.name: CountOfCurrentRoleAssignments
schema.Description: How many role assignments this agent currently holds. Counts only CURRENT assignments via the CurrentAgentKey echo — counting all assignments would report a departed agent as engaged forever.

schema.name: IsStillEngaged
schema.Description: TRUE when this agent currently holds at least one role in the organization.

schema.name: DecisionCount
schema.Description: Total decisions this agent has recorded.

schema.name: OverriddenDecisionCount
schema.Description: Decisions by this agent that a human corrected or reversed.

schema.name: OverrideRatePercent
schema.Description: Percentage of this agent's decisions that were overridden by a human.

schema.name: IsNonHuman
schema.Description: TRUE when this agent is an AI agent or an automated pipeline.

schema.name: BoundaryViolationCount
schema.Description: Number of decisions by this agent that violated an authority boundary.

schema.name: IsOperatingOutsideBoundary
schema.Description: TRUE when this agent has made at least one decision an authority boundary forbids.

schema.name: DraftDecisionCount
schema.Description: Number of drafting decisions this agent has made.

schema.name: OverriddenDraftCount
schema.Description: Number of this agent's drafting decisions a human corrected or reversed.

schema.name: DraftRewriteRatePercent
schema.Description: Percentage of this agent's drafting output that a human rewrote.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact semantic type IRI used when projecting the agent.

Roles.Description: Stable organizational functions separated from the agents that currently fill them. Maps to pro:Role.

schema.name: RoleId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Roles row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Roles row.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: Human-readable role label.

schema.name: Organization
schema.Description: Organization that owns the role.

schema.name: CurrentAgent
schema.Description: Current agent filling the role; history is retained in RoleAssignments.

schema.name: CurrentAgentKind
schema.Description: Agent category of the current role filler.

schema.name: Responsibility
schema.Description: Accountability and responsibility assigned to the role.

schema.name: ActiveAssignmentCount
schema.Description: Total number of assignment rows ever recorded against this role.

schema.name: CurrentlyCoveredAssignmentCount
schema.Description: Number of assignment rows for this role that are in force right now.

schema.name: HasNoCurrentHolder
schema.Description: TRUE when no assignment currently covers this role — the role is uncovered.

schema.name: CountOfAwaitedDecisions
schema.Description: How many change requests name this role as the deciding authority.

schema.name: CurrentAssignment
schema.Description: The RoleAssignments id of the assignment by which this role is currently held. Deliberately a raw identifier, not a relationship: RoleAssignments already points at Roles, so an FK back would make the two mutually dependent and this rulebook must stay acyclic.

schema.name: CurrentAssignmentValidFrom
schema.Description: Start of the currently-in-force assignment for this role.

schema.name: IsNonHumanHeld
schema.Description: TRUE when the role's current agent is an AI agent or automated pipeline.

schema.name: IsUngovernedNonHumanRole
schema.Description: TRUE when a role is pointed at a non-human agent but has no assignment row granting it.

schema.name: DepartedAssignmentCount
schema.Description: How many assignments to this role have ended.

schema.name: HasLostAHolder
schema.Description: Whether anyone has ever departed this role.

schema.name: IsVacatedRole
schema.Description: A role somebody departed and that nobody currently covers.

schema.name: UngroundedBoundaryCount
schema.Description: How many boundaries constrain this role on lapsed authority.

schema.name: IsGovernedByLapsedAuthority
schema.Description: TRUE when at least one constraint on this role rests on knowledge that is no longer valid.

schema.name: UnescalatedRefusalCount
schema.Description: How many refusals this role should have been told about and was not.

schema.name: UnauthorizedEnforcementAssignmentCount
schema.Description: How many current assignments of this role are unauthorized enforcement assignments.

schema.name: IsUngovernedEnforcementRole
schema.Description: TRUE when a role that enforces controls on others is held with no recorded authorization.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact semantic type IRI for the role.

data.Label: Finance Analyst
data.Responsibility: Preparer of reconciliations and variance evidence.

data.Label: Corporate Controller
data.Responsibility: Owner of close controls and first approval authority.

data.Label: Chief Financial Officer
data.Responsibility: Final authority for the financial close.

data.Label: People Policy Owner
data.Responsibility: Accountable owner for employment policy content.

data.Label: Employment Counsel
data.Responsibility: Legal reviewer for workforce policy changes.

data.Label: Close Automation Operator
data.Responsibility: Deterministic extraction, posting, and archival operator.

data.Label: Variance Review Agent
data.Responsibility: AI assistant that classifies and prioritizes variances.

data.Label: Policy Drafting Agent
data.Responsibility: AI assistant that drafts policy and channel variants.

data.Label: Notification Publisher
data.Responsibility: Pipeline that applies channel rules and sends approved messages.

data.Label: Procedural Knowledge Steward
data.Responsibility: Maintains procedural knowledge health and review cadence.

data.Label: Procedural Knowledge Authority
data.Responsibility: Approves semantic changes that alter commitments or controls.

RoleAssignments.Description: Time-bounded records of agents holding roles. Maps to pro:RoleInTime and preserves assignment history instead of overwriting it.

schema.name: RoleAssignmentId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one RoleAssignments row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the RoleAssignments row.

schema.name: Role
schema.Description: Role held during the assignment.

schema.name: Agent
schema.Description: Agent holding the role.

schema.name: ValidFrom
schema.Description: Start of the assignment's valid-time interval.

schema.name: ValidTo
schema.Description: End of the assignment's valid-time interval; null means open-ended.

schema.name: Reason
schema.Description: Rationale for the assignment or reassignment.

schema.name: Status
schema.Description: Active, Superseded, Planned, or Revoked.

schema.name: EvaluationContext
schema.Description: The evaluation context this assignment's currency is judged under.

schema.name: AsOfInstant
schema.Description: The evaluation instant this assignment's currency is judged against.

schema.name: IsCurrent
schema.Description: TRUE when the assignment is valid now.

schema.name: CurrentAgentKey
schema.Description: Echoes the Agent id only while this assignment is current; empty otherwise. Lets a parent count CURRENT assignments with a single-criterion COUNTIFS, which is the only shape this transpiler translates correctly.

schema.name: IsCurrentlyValid
schema.Description: TRUE when this role assignment is active and has not lapsed.

schema.name: AgentRoleKey
schema.Description: Composite agent+role key, emitted only for currently-valid assignments.

schema.name: HasDeparted
schema.Description: TRUE when this role assignment has ended — the agent no longer holds the role.

schema.name: CoversNow
schema.Description: TRUE when this assignment is both status-Active and inside its valid-time window right now.

schema.name: RoleWhenCovering
schema.Description: Echoes the role id when this assignment is currently in force, blank otherwise.

schema.name: AgentKind
schema.Description: Whether the agent holding this assignment is Human, AIAgent, or AutomatedPipeline.

schema.name: IsNonHumanAssignment
schema.Description: TRUE when this assignment places a non-human agent into the role.

schema.name: SupersedesAssignment
schema.Description: The assignment this one replaced, if any.

schema.name: PredecessorAgentKind
schema.Description: Agent kind of the assignment this one superseded.

schema.name: IsHumanToNonHumanHandover
schema.Description: TRUE when this assignment handed a role from a human to a non-human agent.

schema.name: ApprovingAuthorityRole
schema.Description: Role that approved this assignment.

schema.name: AuthorizingChangeRequest
schema.Description: Change request under which this assignment was approved.

schema.name: IsUnauthorizedNonHumanAssignment
schema.Description: TRUE when a non-human agent holds this role with no approving authority recorded at all. An authority named without a change request is still an authority; the separate WasAuthorizedByChangeRequest column carries that weaker distinction.

schema.name: WasAuthorizedByChangeRequest
schema.Description: TRUE when this assignment's authorization is traceable to a change request, not merely to a named role. The stronger form of authorization, kept separate so the weaker one is not silently reported as unauthorized.

schema.name: DecisionCount
schema.Description: Decisions made under this assignment.

schema.name: OverriddenDecisionCount
schema.Description: Decisions made under this assignment that a human corrected or reversed.

schema.name: OverrideRatePercent
schema.Description: Percentage of decisions under this assignment that a human overrode.

schema.name: PredecessorOverrideRatePercent
schema.Description: Override rate of the assignment this one superseded.

schema.name: QualityRegressedVsPredecessor
schema.Description: TRUE when this assignment is overridden by humans more often than the assignment it replaced.

schema.name: DepartedRoleKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: the role this assignment covered when the assignment has ended, blank otherwise.

schema.name: MinimumDecisionsForComparison
schema.Description: The number of decisions below which an override-rate comparison is not considered evidentially meaningful for this role.

schema.name: PredecessorDecisionCount
schema.Description: How many decisions the superseded assignment produced.

schema.name: HasSufficientSample
schema.Description: TRUE when this assignment has produced enough decisions for its override rate to mean anything.

schema.name: PredecessorHasSufficientSample
schema.Description: TRUE when the predecessor assignment produced enough decisions to compare against.

schema.name: ComparisonIsEvidentiallySound
schema.Description: TRUE when both sides of the override-rate comparison rest on adequate samples.

schema.name: SingleOverrideSwingPercent
schema.Description: How many percentage points one additional override would move this assignment's rate. The fragility of the number.

schema.name: QualityVerdictIsUnsupported
schema.Description: TRUE when a quality verdict is being reported for this assignment on a sample too small to support it.

schema.name: IsUnmeasuredAutomationHandover
schema.Description: TRUE when a human-to-machine handover is operating without a statistically meaningful quality comparison behind it.

schema.name: ErrorCorrectionCount
schema.Description: How many of this assignment's decisions were overridden because they were wrong.

schema.name: ErrorRatePercent
schema.Description: Percentage of this assignment's decisions overridden as errors -- the override rate with reserved-judgment overrides removed.

schema.name: AuthorizationDecidedAt
schema.Description: When the approving authority actually granted this assignment. Empty when no authorization was ever recorded.

schema.name: AuthorizationReviewedAt
schema.Description: When the authorization for this assignment was last re-examined.

schema.name: AuthorizationReviewCadenceDays
schema.Description: How often this assignment's authorization is promised to be re-examined.

schema.name: HasDatedAuthorization
schema.Description: TRUE when this assignment carries both a named approving authority and the date they granted it.

schema.name: DaysSinceAuthorizationReview
schema.Description: How long since this assignment's authorization was last re-examined.

schema.name: AuthorizationIsOverdueForReview
schema.Description: TRUE when the promised re-examination interval has elapsed without a review.

schema.name: IsStandingUnreviewedAutomation
schema.Description: TRUE when a currently-active non-human assignment has been running past its authorization review date.

schema.name: IsUnconditionedAutomationHandover
schema.Description: TRUE when a human-to-machine handover was authorized with no promised review cadence at all -- granted once, permanently.

schema.name: MaxTolerableErrorRatePercent
schema.Description: The error rate at or above which this assignment must stop making decisions unaided.

schema.name: ExceedsTolerableErrorRate
schema.Description: TRUE when this assignment's error rate has reached the threshold set when it was authorized.

schema.name: BoundaryViolationCountForAssignment
schema.Description: How many decisions under this assignment violated an authority boundary.

schema.name: HasAnyBoundaryViolation
schema.Description: TRUE when any decision under this assignment crossed a boundary it was forbidden to cross.

schema.name: HasUngroundedGoverningBoundary
schema.Description: TRUE when at least one boundary constraining this assignment's role rests on lapsed knowledge.

schema.name: SuspensionConditionMet
schema.Description: TRUE when any pre-declared condition requiring this assignment to stop deciding unaided has been met.

schema.name: IsOperatingUnderMetSuspensionCondition
schema.Description: TRUE when a suspension condition has been met and the assignment is nonetheless still active and still deciding.

schema.name: HasDeclaredSuspensionCondition
schema.Description: TRUE when this assignment has any pre-declared condition under which it must stop at all.

schema.name: HasApprovingAuthority
schema.Description: TRUE when a role is recorded as having approved this assignment.

schema.name: HasAuthorizingChangeRequest
schema.Description: TRUE when a change request is recorded as the governance vehicle for this assignment.

schema.name: IsEnforcementRole
schema.Description: Whether this role's function is to enforce controls on other agents' actions.

schema.name: IsUnauthorizedEnforcementAgent
schema.Description: TRUE when a non-human agent enforces controls on others while holding no recorded authorization of its own.

schema.name: GovernanceEvidenceCount
schema.Description: How many independent governance artifacts back this assignment: an approving role, an authorizing change request.

schema.name: UnauthorizedEnforcementRoleKey
schema.Description: Echoes the role only for non-human assignments nobody authorized; empty otherwise.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact class IRI for the assignment event.

data.Reason: Knowledge authority vested with the CFO for financial procedures

CommunitiesOfPractice.Description: Socio-technical communities that transmit and maintain procedural knowledge. Explicit ERB-PKO extension.

schema.name: CommunityOfPracticeId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one CommunitiesOfPractice row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the CommunitiesOfPractice row.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: Community's human-readable name.

schema.name: Organization
schema.Description: Organization hosting the community.

schema.name: StewardRole
schema.Description: Role accountable for convening and maintaining the community.

schema.name: Purpose
schema.Description: Shared practice and knowledge-transfer purpose.

schema.name: Cadence
schema.Description: Meeting or practice cadence.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Extension class IRI.

data.Label: Financial Close Community of Practice
data.Purpose: Share close exceptions, reconcile recurring failure modes, and mentor new preparers.
data.Cadence: Monthly and after every quarter close

data.Label: Policy Stewardship Circle
data.Purpose: Review workforce-policy changes, employee feedback, and notification effectiveness.

Mentorships.Description: Time-bounded apprenticeship relationships that intentionally transfer situated procedural knowledge. Explicit ERB-PKO extension.

schema.name: MentorshipId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Mentorships row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Mentorships row.

schema.name: CommunityOfPractice
schema.Description: Community in which the mentorship operates.

schema.name: MentorAgent
schema.Description: Experienced practitioner serving as mentor.

schema.name: LearnerAgent
schema.Description: Practitioner learning the procedure.

schema.name: ValidFrom
schema.Description: Mentorship start.

schema.name: ValidTo
schema.Description: Mentorship end.

schema.name: LearningObjective
schema.Description: Procedural capability to be transferred.

schema.name: EvidenceOfCompletion
schema.Description: Evidence showing completion or competence.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Extension class IRI.

data.LearningObjective: Independently diagnose material variances and produce an auditable controller-ready explanation.
data.EvidenceOfCompletion: Three consecutive reconciliations accepted without rework.

schema.name: ProcedureTypeId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one ProcedureTypes row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the ProcedureTypes row.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: Procedure type label.

schema.name: Definition
schema.Description: Definition and scope of the procedure type.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact class IRI for procedure types.

data.Label: Financial Standard Operating Procedure
data.Definition: A controlled procedure for financial operations, approvals, evidence, and auditability.

data.Label: Employee Communication Policy Procedure
data.Definition: A controlled procedure that creates, approves, and distributes workforce policy communications.

Procedures.Description: Abstract, discoverable procedures. Each version is represented separately in ProcedureVersions. Maps to pko:Procedure and dcat:Resource.

schema.name: ProcedureId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Procedures row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Procedures row.

schema.name: Title
schema.Description: Human-readable title; maps to dcterms:title.

schema.name: ProcedureType
schema.Description: Procedure type; maps to pko:hasProcedureType.

schema.name: OwnerOrganization
schema.Description: Organization that owns the procedure.

schema.name: AdoptedByOrganization
schema.Description: Organization that adopts the procedure; maps to pko:isAdoptedBy.

schema.name: Purpose
schema.Description: Desired outcome and scope of the procedure.

schema.name: Target
schema.Description: Thing or population on which the procedure acts; maps to pko:hasProcedureTarget.

schema.name: IsTemplate
schema.Description: TRUE when the procedure is a reusable template; maps to pko:isTemplate.

schema.name: CurrentVersionKey
schema.Description: Current version identifier, mirrored structurally by ProcedureVersions.IsCurrent.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact PKO class IRI.

data.Title: Quarter-End Financial Close
data.Purpose: Close the general ledger accurately, produce evidence, and obtain independent approval.
data.Target: Corporate general ledger and reporting package

data.Title: Workforce Policy Change and Employee Notification
data.Purpose: Turn an approved workforce policy change into governed, channel-appropriate employee communications and acknowledgements.
data.Target: All affected employees and workforce-policy records

ProcedureVersions.Description: Versioned procedure specifications. Maps to pko:Procedure plus DCAT version relations and PKO versionNumber/newVersionMotivation/changelogDescription.

schema.name: ProcedureVersionId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one ProcedureVersions row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the ProcedureVersions row.

schema.name: Procedure
schema.Description: Abstract procedure of which this is a version.

schema.name: VersionNumber
schema.Description: Version number; maps to pko:versionNumber.

schema.name: Title
schema.Description: Version-specific title.

schema.name: Status
schema.Description: PKO procedure status individual: Draft, Validation, Approval, Approved, Deprecated, or Archived.

schema.name: IssuedAt
schema.Description: Issue timestamp; maps to dcterms:issued.

schema.name: ModifiedAt
schema.Description: Last semantic modification; maps to dcterms:modified.

schema.name: CreatedByAgent
schema.Description: Agent that created the version; maps to dcterms:creator.

schema.name: ModifiedByAgent
schema.Description: Agent that last modified the version; maps to pko:wasModifiedBy.

schema.name: NewVersionMotivation
schema.Description: Reason for the new version; maps to pko:newVersionMotivation.

schema.name: ChangelogDescription
schema.Description: Semantic change description; maps to pko:changelogDescription.

schema.name: IsCurrent
schema.Description: TRUE when this is the current version.

schema.name: CountOfSteps
schema.Description: Number of steps in this version.

schema.name: CountOfOpenKnowledgeGaps
schema.Description: Open knowledge gaps for this version.

schema.name: IsReadyForExecution
schema.Description: TRUE when approved, populated, and free of blocking knowledge gaps.

schema.name: SpecifiedStepCount
schema.Description: How many steps the specification defines for this version.

schema.name: OverdueReviewCount
schema.Description: How many reviews of this procedure version are past due.

schema.name: OpenChangeRequestCount
schema.Description: How many change requests are open against this version.

schema.name: OpenHighSeverityGapCount
schema.Description: How many high-severity knowledge gaps are open against this version.

schema.name: IsFitToExecute
schema.Description: TRUE when this version is approved, current on review, and carries no open change request or high-severity gap.

schema.name: StewardReviewCadenceDays
schema.Description: The review cadence promised by this version's stewardship assignment, in days. Summed because a version has at most one active steward; this is the hop that lets ReviewEvents resolve the promise via a primary-key match.

schema.name: CountOfStewardshipAssignments
schema.Description: How many stewardship assignments of any vintage point at this version.

schema.name: HasAnySteward
schema.Description: TRUE if any stewardship assignment has ever named this version.

schema.name: IsLive
schema.Description: TRUE when this version is in a state where somebody could execute it.

schema.name: IsUnstewarded
schema.Description: TRUE when no stewardship assignment names this version.

schema.name: IsLiveAndUnstewarded
schema.Description: TRUE when an executable version has nobody accountable for keeping it healthy.

schema.name: CountOfOpenBlockingGaps
schema.Description: How many open blocking gaps stand against this version.

schema.name: HasOpenBlockingGap
schema.Description: TRUE when at least one open blocking gap stands against this version.

schema.name: IsLiveWithBlockingGap
schema.Description: TRUE when an executable version carries an unresolved blocking knowledge gap.

schema.name: ShouldNotBeExecutable
schema.Description: TRUE when the model says this version is ready to execute while a blocking gap is open against it.

schema.name: CountOfUnapprovedRelianceFragments
schema.Description: How many unapproved claims this version is relying on.

schema.name: RunsOnUnapprovedKnowledge
schema.Description: TRUE when this version depends on at least one claim the knowledge authority has not approved.

schema.name: CountOfOverdueGaps
schema.Description: How many acknowledged unknowns against this version have outlived their tolerance.

schema.name: CountOfChangeRequests
schema.Description: How many change requests have ever been raised against this version.

schema.name: CountOfReviewEvents
schema.Description: How many review events have ever been recorded against this version.

schema.name: HasGovernanceRecord
schema.Description: TRUE when at least one change request or review event exists for this version.

schema.name: EvaluationContext
schema.Description: The evaluation context this row's time-dependent witnesses are judged under.

schema.name: AsOfInstant
schema.Description: The evaluation instant this row's time-dependent witnesses are judged against.

schema.name: DaysSinceModified
schema.Description: Days since this version's content was last changed.

schema.name: DaysSinceLastReview
schema.Description: Days since the most recent review of this version.

schema.name: WasModifiedSinceLastReview
schema.Description: TRUE when the version was edited more recently than it was reviewed.

schema.name: ModifierIsAuthority
schema.Description: The kind of agent that last modified this version.

schema.name: HasUnwitnessedChange
schema.Description: TRUE when a live version's current content postdates every review it has had.

schema.name: CountOfStaleFragments
schema.Description: How many supporting claims have outlived this version's review cadence.

schema.name: KnowledgeIsStalerThanCadence
schema.Description: TRUE when this version rests on at least one claim older than its own review cadence.

schema.name: CompoundFragileFragmentCount
schema.Description: How many compound-fragile knowledge fragments this version rests on.

schema.name: RestsOnCompoundFragileKnowledge
schema.Description: A live procedure version resting on at least one knowledge fragment that carries three or more decay signals.

schema.name: ConcentratedWitnessSessionCount
schema.Description: How many concentrated single-witness sessions underwrite this version's knowledge base.

schema.name: KnowledgeBaseIsConcentrated
schema.Description: A live version where at least one single-witness session alone underwrites three or more of its live claims.

schema.name: MachineConsumedUnapprovedCount
schema.Description: How many unapproved claims this version feeds directly to software-assigned steps.

schema.name: FeedsUnapprovedKnowledgeToMachines
schema.Description: A live version that hands unapproved knowledge to a step no human is positioned to review.

schema.name: GenuinelyOverdueFragmentCount
schema.Description: How many of this version's claims are overdue by actual review record rather than by inference.

schema.name: AwaitedDecisionCount
schema.Description: How many decisions are pending against this live version.

schema.name: ScopedOpenBlockingGapCount
schema.Description: How many open blocking gaps belong to THIS version, correctly scoped.

schema.name: IsBlockedOnPendingDecision
schema.Description: A live version carrying both an undecided change request and an open blocking gap — the gap cannot close until the decision lands.

schema.name: UnexercisedHumanGateCount
schema.Description: How many of this version's human-only gates have never been approached by software.

schema.name: AiBoundaryIsUnevidenced
schema.Description: A live version whose human-only gates rest on assertion rather than on any observed attempt by software.

schema.name: LoadBearingUnapprovedCount
schema.Description: How many high-blast-radius unapproved claims this version rests on.

schema.name: UnlandedDecisionCount
schema.Description: How many decided-but-unimplemented change requests hold this version's fitness down.

schema.name: UnrehearsedControlEntryCount
schema.Description: How many unrehearsed control entries exist in this procedure version.

schema.name: HasUnrehearsedControlEntry
schema.Description: Whether this live version has at least one blocking control that is only reachable by a path nobody has ever walked.

schema.name: IsLiveWithUnrehearsedControl
schema.Description: A version that is live for execution while carrying at least one never-rehearsed blocking control entry.

schema.name: CadenceBreachCount
schema.Description: How many review events on this version are past their promised cadence.

schema.name: IsInCadenceBreach
schema.Description: Whether this version currently has at least one review event past the cadence its steward promised.

schema.name: HasDecisionInFlight
schema.Description: Whether this version has at least one change request that is still open.

schema.name: IsUnremediatedCadenceBreach
schema.Description: A cadence breach with no open change request against the version — a broken promise with no response in motion.

schema.name: IsManagedCadenceBreach
schema.Description: A cadence breach where a change request is at least open against the version.

schema.name: GovernanceIsSilent
schema.Description: A live version with neither a change request nor a review event ever recorded against it.

schema.name: ValidFragmentCount
schema.Description: How many currently-valid knowledge fragments are attached to this version.

schema.name: StillOwnsValidKnowledge
schema.Description: Whether this version still holds at least one knowledge fragment that is currently valid.

schema.name: IncomingSupersessionCount
schema.Description: How many other versions declare that they supersede this one.

schema.name: IsStillReferenced
schema.Description: Whether any other version points at this one through a supersession link.

schema.name: IsLoadBearingOrphan
schema.Description: An unstewarded version that is still referenced by a supersession link or still owns currently-valid knowledge — nobody is accountable for it and something still depends on it.

schema.name: IsCleanlyRetired
schema.Description: An unstewarded version that nothing depends on — a genuine, safe retirement.

schema.name: StalledImplementationCount
schema.Description: How many approved-but-unimplemented change requests are stalled against this version.

schema.name: IsHeldUnfitByLandedDecisions
schema.Description: A version reading unfit to execute specifically because approved changes have not been marked implemented.

schema.name: UndeclaredControlKindCount
schema.Description: How many steps in this version have not declared a control kind.

schema.name: ControlTaxonomyIsIncomplete
schema.Description: Whether this version contains any step whose control kind is unstated — meaning role-based and id-based control predicates cannot be trusted to cover it.

schema.name: HasApprovedChangeRequest
schema.Description: TRUE when at least one change request against this version has been approved.

schema.name: ApprovedChangeRequestCount
schema.Description: How many change requests against this version have been approved.

schema.name: UnwatchedUnownedControlCount
schema.Description: How many blocking controls in the model are neither computed nor owned.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact PKO class IRI.

ProcedureVersionLinks.Description: Directed links between versioned procedures. Maps to dcat:previousVersion/dcat:hasVersion and pko:nextVersion.

schema.name: ProcedureVersionLinkId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one ProcedureVersionLinks row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the ProcedureVersionLinks row.

schema.name: PreviousProcedureVersion
schema.Description: Earlier version.

schema.name: NextProcedureVersion
schema.Description: Later version.

schema.name: RelationIri
schema.Description: Exact version relation IRI.

schema.name: ChangeSummary
schema.Description: Summary of semantic change across the edge.

schema.name: SupersededVersionKey
schema.Description: Echoes the superseded (previous) version id for rows that express a next-version relation. Supersession is carried by RelationIri here, not by a separate link-kind column.

data.ChangeSummary: Added timestamp control, AI variance triage, and explicit knowledge capture.

ProcedureStatusChanges.Description: Lifecycle events that move a procedure version between PKO statuses. Maps to pko:ChangeOfStatus, fromStatus, toStatus, and prov:atTime.

schema.name: ProcedureStatusChangeId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one ProcedureStatusChanges row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the ProcedureStatusChanges row.

schema.name: ProcedureVersion
schema.Description: Procedure version whose status changed.

schema.name: FromStatus
schema.Description: Previous PKO status.

schema.name: ToStatus
schema.Description: New PKO status.

schema.name: ChangedAt
schema.Description: Time of change; maps to prov:atTime.

schema.name: ChangedByAgent
schema.Description: Agent responsible for the change.

schema.name: Motivation
schema.Description: Reason for changing status.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact PKO class IRI.

data.Motivation: Ready for control and ontology validation.
All requirements and test cases passed.
Ready for legal and communications review.

Steps.Description: Version-scoped units of work. Atomic steps map to pplan:Step; composite steps map to pplan:MultiStep. The specification is never conflated with execution.

schema.name: StepId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Steps row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Steps row.

schema.name: ProcedureVersion
schema.Description: Procedure version containing the step; maps to pko:hasStep/pplan:isStepOfPlan.

schema.name: StepNumber
schema.Description: Stable sequence label; maps to pko:stepNumber.

schema.name: Title
schema.Description: Human-readable step title.

schema.name: StepKind
schema.Description: Atomic or MultiStep.

schema.name: AssignedRole
schema.Description: Role responsible for the step.

schema.name: AssignedRoleLabel
schema.Description: Resolved role label.

schema.name: AssignedAgentKind
schema.Description: Current role-filler category.

schema.name: Instruction
schema.Description: Normative step instruction.

schema.name: ExpectedDurationMinutes
schema.Description: Expected duration represented as an OWL-Time duration in semantic projections.

schema.name: ExpertiseLevel
schema.Description: PKO expertise level: Junior, Senior, Expert, or Master.

schema.name: RequiresHumanConfirmation
schema.Description: TRUE when a human must confirm the step; maps to pko:wasConfirmedBy at execution.

schema.name: BlockingRequirementCount
schema.Description: How many blocking requirements the specification attaches to this step.

schema.name: StaleBindingCount
schema.Description: How many operational bindings for this step are currently outside their freshness SLA.

schema.name: AuthoritativeStaleCount
schema.Description: How many authoritative bindings for this step are currently stale.

schema.name: AvailableExceptionCount
schema.Description: How many active exceptions the specification defines for this step.

schema.name: DeclaredVerificationCount
schema.Description: How many verifications the specification declares for this step.

schema.name: IsPreparationStep
schema.Description: TRUE for steps whose assigned role produces the work product rather than reviewing it.

schema.name: IsApprovalStep
schema.Description: TRUE for steps whose assigned role is an approval authority.

schema.name: StaleAuthoritativeBindingCount
schema.Description: Number of authoritative bindings for this step that are past their freshness SLA.

schema.name: InputsAreFresh
schema.Description: TRUE when no authoritative binding for this step is stale.

schema.name: IsSoftwareAssigned
schema.Description: TRUE when this step is specified to be performed by software rather than a person.

schema.name: IsHumanApprovalGate
schema.Description: TRUE for the steps that exist specifically to place a human commitment between drafting and delivery.

schema.name: GateHeldByHuman
schema.Description: TRUE when a designated approval gate is in fact assigned to a human role.

schema.name: BindingBoundaryCount
schema.Description: Number of authority boundaries currently binding at this step.

schema.name: AssignedRoleIsUngoverned
schema.Description: Whether this step's assigned role is a non-human role with no governing assignment.

schema.name: UnusableBindingCount
schema.Description: Number of bindings at this step that are unapproved or stale.

schema.name: AllSourcesUsable
schema.Description: TRUE when every binding at this step is an approved, fresh source.

schema.name: ControlKind
schema.Description: What kind of control this step is: Preparation, Approval, LegalReview, Verification, Extraction, Publication, Retrospective, or None. That policy-04 is a legal review is a property OF policy-04, not of a formula that happens to name it; storing it as data makes downstream predicates portable to procedures that do not exist yet.

schema.name: UnwarrantedBoundaryCount
schema.Description: How many boundaries governing this step are being enforced without a valid ratifying claim.

schema.name: IsGovernedByUnwarrantedBoundary
schema.Description: Whether this step's constraints on machine authority rest on a claim that is no longer valid.

schema.name: SoftwareExecutionCount
schema.Description: How many times a software agent has actually executed this step.

schema.name: HasBeenApproachedBySoftware
schema.Description: Whether any software agent has ever executed this step.

schema.name: IsUnexercisedHumanGate
schema.Description: A human-only approval gate that no software agent has ever attempted — the control is asserted, not demonstrated.

schema.name: IsDemonstratedHumanGate
schema.Description: A human gate that software has actually reached and that a human nevertheless held.

schema.name: UnexercisedGateVersionKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: this step's procedure version when the step is an unexercised human gate, blank otherwise.

schema.name: HasDeclaredControlKind
schema.Description: Whether this step declares what kind of control it is.

schema.name: UndeclaredControlVersionKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: this step's procedure version when the step has no declared control kind, blank otherwise.

schema.name: ApprovalStepIsSoftwareAssigned
schema.Description: An approval-kind step whose assigned role is currently held by an AI agent or automated pipeline.

schema.name: UnwitnessedBlockingCount
schema.Description: How many blocking controls bound to this step have no computed witness.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact P-Plan class IRI.

data.Title: Freeze transaction entry
data.Instruction: Lock subledgers and prevent late postings.

data.Title: Extract trial balance and feed timestamps
data.Instruction: Extract the trial balance and source-system timestamps.

data.Title: Reconcile material accounts
data.Instruction: Reconcile material accounts and attach evidence.

data.Title: Classify and investigate variances
data.Instruction: Use AI triage, then apply human situated judgment to material or anomalous variances.

data.Title: Controller review
data.Instruction: Independently review reconciliations, evidence, and unresolved items.

data.Title: CFO approval
data.Instruction: Approve the close package or return it with required corrections.

data.Title: Post close and publish package
data.Instruction: Post approved entries and publish the reporting package.

data.Title: Archive evidence and hold retrospective
data.Instruction: Archive evidence and capture questions, issues, and lessons learned.

data.Title: Identify policy trigger and affected population
data.Instruction: Establish the legal/business trigger and population affected.

data.Title: Elicit process and practitioner knowledge
data.Instruction: Interview practitioners, inspect source artifacts, and record tacit/implicit/explicit knowledge.

data.Title: Draft policy and channel variants
data.Instruction: Draft the policy and proposed email/SMS variants from approved sources.

data.Title: Legal and privacy review
data.Instruction: Review legal commitments, privacy, consent, retention, and jurisdictional requirements.

data.Title: Human authority approval
data.Instruction: Approve the policy meaning and all channel constraints.

data.Title: Generate approved communications
data.Instruction: Render approved email and SMS messages without changing policy meaning.

data.Title: Apply channel controls and send
data.Instruction: Enforce consent, quiet hours, opt-out text, recipient scope, and delivery logging.

data.Title: Collect acknowledgements and exceptions
data.Instruction: Collect acknowledgements and create exception tasks for unreachable recipients.

data.Title: Review feedback and update knowledge
data.Instruction: Review questions, feedback, delivery failures, and proposed knowledge changes.

StepTransitions.Description: Directed control-flow edges represented as first-class pko:Transition instances with fromStep/toStep and next/alternative/fallback semantics.

schema.name: StepTransitionId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one StepTransitions row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the StepTransitions row.

schema.name: ProcedureVersion
schema.Description: Procedure version whose control flow owns the transition.

schema.name: FromStep
schema.Description: Source step; maps to pko:fromStep.

schema.name: ToStep
schema.Description: Destination step; maps to pko:toStep.

schema.name: TransitionKind
schema.Description: Next, Alternative, or Fallback.

schema.name: Condition
schema.Description: Condition under which the edge is taken.

schema.name: Priority
schema.Description: Evaluation priority when several outgoing edges exist.

schema.name: IsRecoveryPath
schema.Description: TRUE when this transition is a non-default path taken because something went wrong.

schema.name: CountOfFromStepExecutions
schema.Description: How many times the step this transition leaves from has actually been executed.

schema.name: CountOfToStepExecutions
schema.Description: How many times the step this transition arrives at has actually been executed.

schema.name: HasReachableOrigin
schema.Description: TRUE when the origin step of this transition has been executed at least once.

schema.name: HasReachableTarget
schema.Description: TRUE when the destination step of this transition has been executed at least once.

schema.name: IsNeverExercised
schema.Description: TRUE when at least one end of this transition has never appeared in any step execution.

schema.name: IsUntestedRecoveryPath
schema.Description: TRUE for a Fallback or Alternative transition whose endpoints show no execution evidence.

schema.name: CountOfObservedTraversals
schema.Description: How many times this exact transition has actually been traversed.

schema.name: HasBeenTraversed
schema.Description: TRUE when this transition has been walked at least once.

schema.name: IsUnwalkedRecoveryPath
schema.Description: TRUE for a Fallback/Alternative transition with zero recorded traversals.

schema.name: TargetBlockingRequirementCount
schema.Description: How many blocking requirements are attached to the step this transition lands on.

schema.name: TargetCarriesBlockingControl
schema.Description: Whether the destination step of this transition carries at least one blocking control.

schema.name: IsUnrehearsedControlEntry
schema.Description: A recovery path that has never been traversed and that leads into a step carrying a blocking control.

schema.name: UnrehearsedControlVersionKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: this transition's procedure version when it is an unrehearsed control entry, blank otherwise.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact PKO class IRI.

data.Condition: Evidence is incomplete or source balance changed after extraction
CFO rejects package or requests further analysis

schema.name: ActionId

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Actions row.

schema.name: Label

Functions.Description: Software or algorithmic functions required by steps. Maps to pko:Function and pko:requiresFunction.

schema.name: FunctionId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Functions row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Functions row.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: Function label.

schema.name: Definition
schema.Description: Deterministic or AI-assisted behavior.

schema.name: ImplementationKey
schema.Description: Operational implementation or model key.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri

Tools.Description: Tools required to execute steps. Maps to m4ing:Tool and pko:requiresTool.

schema.name: ToolId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Tools row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Tools row.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: Tool label.

schema.name: Purpose
schema.Description: Operational purpose.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact semantic class IRI.

schema.name: StepActionId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one StepActions row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the StepActions row.

schema.name: Step
schema.Description: Step side of the relationship.

schema.name: Action
schema.Description: Action side of the relationship.

StepFunctions.Description: Many-to-many Step/Function semantics normalized into an ERB junction table.

schema.name: StepFunctionId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one StepFunctions row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the StepFunctions row.

schema.name: Step
schema.Description: Step side of the relationship.

schema.name: Function
schema.Description: Function side of the relationship.

StepTools.Description: Many-to-many Step/Tool semantics normalized into an ERB junction table.

schema.name: StepToolId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one StepTools row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the StepTools row.

schema.name: Step
schema.Description: Step side of the relationship.

schema.name: Tool
schema.Description: Tool side of the relationship.

Requirements.Description: Normative requirements applied to procedures, steps, or transitions. Maps to pko:Requirement and pko:hasRequirement.

schema.name: RequirementId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Requirements row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Requirements row.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: Requirement label.

schema.name: RequirementType
schema.Description: Controlled requirement type; maps to pko:hasRequirementType.

schema.name: Statement
schema.Description: Normative requirement statement.

schema.name: Rationale
schema.Description: Why the requirement exists.

schema.name: IsBlocking
schema.Description: TRUE when unsatisfied requirement blocks execution or approval.

schema.name: SatisfactionRecordCount
schema.Description: How many times this requirement has ever been evaluated against an execution.

schema.name: StepBindingCount
schema.Description: How many steps the specification binds this requirement to.

schema.name: IsBoundToAnyStep
schema.Description: TRUE when at least one step carries this requirement.

schema.name: HasEverBeenEvaluated
schema.Description: TRUE when this requirement has at least one satisfaction record in the model.

schema.name: NegativeOutcomeCount
schema.Description: How many times this requirement has ever produced a less-than-satisfied outcome.

schema.name: IsInoperativeControl
schema.Description: TRUE for a blocking requirement that is attached to a step in the specification but has never once been evaluated on any execution.

schema.name: IsDecorativeControl
schema.Description: TRUE for a blocking requirement that is not attached to any step at all.

schema.name: HasComputedWitness
schema.Description: Whether a computed predicate in this rulebook evaluates this requirement, as opposed to it being satisfied by human assertion only.

schema.name: WitnessFieldName
schema.Description: The fully-qualified Table.Field of the predicate that computes this requirement, when one exists.

schema.name: HasEverProducedNegative
schema.Description: TRUE when this requirement has at least once been scored as anything other than Satisfied.

schema.name: IsUnfalsifiedControl
schema.Description: TRUE for a blocking control that HAS been evaluated at least once and has never returned a negative result.

schema.name: ClaimsAWitnessField
schema.Description: TRUE when this requirement names a field it claims computes it.

schema.name: NamedWitnessFieldExists
schema.Description: TRUE when the field named in WitnessFieldName actually exists in the field catalog AND is a derived (calculated/lookup/aggregation) field.

schema.name: DerivedHasComputedWitness
schema.Description: Whether this requirement genuinely has a computed witness, derived from the field catalog rather than asserted.

schema.name: WitnessClaimIsUnverified
schema.Description: TRUE when the hand-typed HasComputedWitness flag disagrees with what the field catalog says.

schema.name: IsUnwitnessedBlockingControl
schema.Description: TRUE for a blocking control with no verified computed witness behind it.

schema.name: WitnessFireCount
schema.Description: How many times this requirement's evaluation has returned a non-Satisfied result.

schema.name: WitnessHasNeverFired
schema.Description: TRUE for a requirement that has a computed witness which has never once returned a negative result.

schema.name: EvaluationSampleSize
schema.Description: How many times this requirement has been evaluated at all.

schema.name: HasMeaningfulSample
schema.Description: TRUE when this requirement has been evaluated often enough that a clean record is informative.

schema.name: MinimumSampleForAssurance
schema.Description: The number of clean evaluations this control must accumulate before its silence counts as evidence.

schema.name: IsUntestedWitness
schema.Description: TRUE for a witness that has never fired and has not been exercised enough for that silence to mean anything.

schema.name: IsEvidencedHoldingControl
schema.Description: TRUE for a witness that has never fired across a sample large enough for that to constitute evidence.

schema.name: ControlAssuranceState
schema.Description: One of Decorative, Inoperative, Asserted, Demonstrated, Holding, or Untested — the single control-health verdict for this requirement.

schema.name: UnexercisedBindingCount
schema.Description: How many of this control's step bindings have never been evaluated.

schema.name: WitnessIsPartiallyScoped
schema.Description: TRUE when a control has a computed witness but at least one of its step bindings has never been exercised by it.

schema.name: AccountableRole
schema.Description: The role answerable for this control operating as designed.

schema.name: AccountableAgent
schema.Description: The person currently holding the accountable role for this control.

schema.name: HasNamedOwner
schema.Description: TRUE when a role has been named as accountable for this control.

schema.name: IsOrphanedBlockingControl
schema.Description: TRUE for a blocking control with nobody named as accountable for it.

schema.name: IsUnwatchedAndUnowned
schema.Description: TRUE for a blocking control that nothing computes and nobody owns.

schema.name: AttestationExposureNote
schema.Description: States, per control, what kind of exposure attesting to it creates.
schema.formula: =IF(NOT({{IsBlocking}}), "", IF({{IsUnwatchedAndUnowned}}, "Unwatched and unowned: exposure defaults to the signatory.", IF({{IsOrphanedBlockingControl}}, "Witnessed but unowned: no named accountability.", IF(NOT({{HasComputedWitness}}), "Owned but unwitnessed: rests on human judgement.", ""))))

schema.name: UnwatchedUnownedFlag
schema.Description: Constant marker echoed when this control is both unwatched and unowned.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact PKO class IRI.

data.Label: Close cutoff enforced
data.Statement: No ledger entry may be posted after cutoff without controller-approved reopening.

data.Label: Reconciled balance integrity
data.Statement: Every material account must reconcile or carry an approved exception.

data.Label: Preparer/approver separation
data.Statement: The preparer may not be the final approver.

data.Label: Evidence retention
data.Statement: Evidence must remain retrievable for 7 years.

data.Label: Human final approval
data.Statement: Controller and CFO approvals must be human-confirmed.

data.Label: Approved source only
data.Statement: Drafting may use only approved source resources and validated elicitation records.

data.Label: Legal review required
data.Statement: Employment counsel must approve legal and privacy commitments.

data.Label: Human meaning approval
data.Statement: An AI agent may draft, but a human policy owner must approve meaning.

data.Label: SMS consent required
data.Statement: SMS may be sent only to recipients with active consent.

data.Label: Quiet hours enforced
data.Statement: SMS delivery must not occur between 20:00 and 08:00 recipient-local time.

data.Label: Opt-out text required
data.Statement: Every SMS must include approved opt-out language.

data.Label: Communication evidence retention
data.Statement: Rendered messages, approvals, recipient scope, and delivery results must be retained for 7 years.

data.Label: Plain-language and accessibility
data.Statement: Email content must be readable, accessible, and include an alternate contact method.

StepRequirements.Description: Many-to-many Step/Requirement semantics normalized into an ERB junction table.

schema.name: StepRequirementId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one StepRequirements row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the StepRequirements row.

schema.name: Step
schema.Description: Step side of the relationship.

schema.name: Requirement
schema.Description: Requirement side of the relationship.

schema.name: RequirementIsBlocking
schema.Description: Whether this spec-side step/requirement binding names a blocking control.

schema.name: BlockingStepKey
schema.Description: Echoes the Step id only when the bound requirement is blocking; empty otherwise.

schema.name: StepWhenBlocking
schema.Description: Echoes the step id when the bound requirement is blocking, blank otherwise.

schema.name: RequirementLacksWitness
schema.Description: Whether the requirement bound at this step is a blocking control with no computed witness.

schema.name: UnwitnessedStepKey
schema.Description: Echoes the step id when the requirement bound here has no computed witness.

schema.name: SatisfactionCountForBinding
schema.Description: How many times this specific (step, requirement) binding has been evaluated in any execution.

schema.name: BindingWasEverExercised
schema.Description: TRUE when this specific (step, requirement) pair has been evaluated at least once.

schema.name: IsUnexercisedBlockingBinding
schema.Description: TRUE for a blocking control bound to a step where it has never actually been evaluated.

schema.name: UnexercisedBindingRequirementKey
schema.Description: Echoes the requirement id when this binding has never been exercised.

StepVerifications.Description: Verification definitions attached to steps. Maps to pko:StepVerification and pko:SignalVerification.

schema.name: StepVerificationId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one StepVerifications row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the StepVerifications row.

schema.name: Step
schema.Description: Step whose execution is verified; maps to pko:hasStepVerification.

schema.name: VerificationKind
schema.Description: SignalVerification, ApprovalVerification, ProvenanceVerification, or another documented kind.

schema.name: SignalIdentifier
schema.Description: Signal or evidence key; maps to pko:signalIdentifier for signal verifications.

schema.name: ExpectedSignalValue
schema.Description: Expected value; maps to pko:expectedSignalValue.

schema.name: Instruction
schema.Description: How to verify the step.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Exact PKO or extension class IRI.

data.Instruction: The ERP reports the close period locked.
All source feeds are no more than 15 minutes old.
No unexplained material variance remains.
Controller approval record exists.
CFO approval record exists.
Draft contains no unapproved source.
Employment counsel approval exists.
Human policy-owner approval exists.
No SMS recipient lacks active consent.
No message was sent during quiet hours.
All recipients acknowledged or have an exception task.

schema.name: RationaleId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one Rationales row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the Rationales row.

schema.name: ProcedureVersion
schema.Description: Version justified by the rationale.

schema.name: Step

data.Title: Why the preparer cannot approve
data.Statement: Independent review prevents self-certification and makes accountability legible.

data.Title: Why AI ranks but does not close variances
data.Statement: The model accelerates triage; materiality, anomaly context, and acceptance remain human judgments.

data.Title: Why AI may draft but not approve
data.Statement: Drafting is reversible assistance; legal and organizational commitments require human authority.

data.Title: Why both email and SMS exist
data.Statement: Email carries complete policy context; consented SMS provides timely notice and a link without becoming the legal record.

Exceptions.Description: Documented exceptions, fallbacks, and alternative handling. Aligns structurally with PKO fallback/alternative steps and requirements; the exception record itself is an ERB-PKO extension.

schema.name: Condition

schema.name: ApprovalRole

schema.name: FallbackRole
schema.Description: Role or function that executes fallback handling.

schema.name: Status
schema.Description: Active, Draft, Retired, or Superseded.

schema.name: ActiveExceptionStepKey
schema.Description: Echoes the TriggerStep id only for exceptions currently in Active status.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri

data.Handling: Delegate approval to the formally designated Acting CFO; never to the preparer.
Use a digitally signed, timestamped snapshot and open a blocking incident; do not silently substitute a spreadsheet.
Suppress SMS and send approved email only.
Create an HR case and route to the employee's manager without marking acknowledgement complete.

KnowledgeFragments.Description: Explicit records of tacit, implicit, explicit, and situated procedural knowledge. This is an ERB-PKO extension represented as provenance-bearing dcat:Resource instances.

schema.name: KnowledgeFragmentId
schema.Description: Stored logical identifier for one KnowledgeFragments row.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable calculated display alias for the KnowledgeFragments row.

schema.name: ProcedureVersion
schema.Description: Procedure version informed by the fragment.

schema.name: Step
schema.Description: Optional step to which the fragment applies.

schema.name: KnowledgeForm
schema.Description: Tacit, Implicit, Explicit, SituatedJudgment, LessonLearned, or another declared form.

schema.name: Statement
schema.Description: Captured knowledge statement.

schema.name: ElicitationSession
schema.Description: Optional elicitation session that produced the fragment.

schema.name: SourceAgent
schema.Description: Practitioner or source agent.

schema.name: Confidence
schema.Description: Low, Medium, or High confidence.

schema.name: ValidFrom
schema.Description: Start of the fragment's valid-time interval.

schema.name: ValidTo
schema.Description: End of the fragment's valid-time interval.

schema.name: Status
schema.Description: Draft, Reviewed, Approved, Rejected, or Superseded.

schema.name: OwnerRole
schema.Description: Role accountable for maintaining the fragment.

schema.name: EvaluationContext
schema.Description: The evaluation context this row's time-dependent witnesses are judged under.

schema.name: AsOfInstant
schema.Description: The evaluation instant this row's time-dependent witnesses are judged against.

schema.name: IsCurrentlyValid
schema.Description: TRUE when the fragment is approved and valid now.

schema.name: SourceAgentIsStillEngaged
schema.Description: Whether the agent who is the source of this claim still holds a role here.

schema.name: SourceAgentKind
schema.Description: Whether the source of this claim is a Human, an AIAgent, or an AutomatedPipeline.

schema.name: HasHumanSource
schema.Description: TRUE when the claim originates from a human practitioner rather than software.

schema.name: HasOrphanedProvenance
schema.Description: TRUE when we still rely on this claim but the agent who gave it to us no longer holds a role here.

schema.name: IsUndefendableTacitClaim
schema.Description: TRUE when an orphaned claim is of a kind that lives in a person's head rather than in a document.

schema.name: IsApproved
schema.Description: TRUE when this claim has passed knowledge-authority approval.

schema.name: IsWithinValidityWindow
schema.Description: TRUE when this claim's stated validity window contains the present moment.

schema.name: IsReliedUpon
schema.Description: TRUE when this claim is attached to a specific step and is inside its validity window — i.e. it is operationally in play.

schema.name: StepProcedureVersionStatus
schema.Description: The procedure version owning the step this claim is attached to.

schema.name: IsAttachedToLiveVersion
schema.Description: Whether the procedure version this claim belongs to is currently executable.

schema.name: IsUnapprovedButReliedOn
schema.Description: TRUE when a live procedure is acting on a claim that has not been approved by the knowledge authority.

schema.name: EvidenceAgeDays
schema.Description: Age in days of the elicitation session this claim came from.

schema.name: HasRecordedElicitation
schema.Description: TRUE when this claim traces to a recorded elicitation session.

schema.name: IsFromSingleWitness
schema.Description: Whether this claim rests on a single practitioner's account.

schema.name: EvidenceExpiryDays
schema.Description: How many days this claim's evidence is trusted for, given how it was gathered.

schema.name: EvidenceHasExpired
schema.Description: TRUE when the evidence behind this claim is older than we trust evidence of its kind to be.

schema.name: OwnerAgent
schema.Description: The agent currently holding the role that owns this claim.

schema.name: IsAwaitingApproval
schema.Description: TRUE when this claim has been reviewed but not yet approved.

schema.name: OwnerIsMe
schema.Description: TRUE when the People Policy Owner role owns this claim.

schema.name: IsMyUnfinishedApproval
schema.Description: TRUE when a claim I own has been reviewed and is waiting on my approval.

schema.name: IsInvokedByAnException
schema.Description: How many documented exception handlers trigger on the same step this claim is attached to.

schema.name: HasOperationalReliance
schema.Description: TRUE when an exception handler exists on the step this claim governs.

schema.name: IsUnapprovedAndOperationallyLive
schema.Description: TRUE when a claim awaiting my approval is already being acted on through a documented exception path.

schema.name: AgeDays
schema.Description: Days since this claim became valid.

schema.name: IsLowConfidence
schema.Description: TRUE when this claim was recorded with less than high confidence.

schema.name: OwningVersionCadenceDays
schema.Description: The review cadence promised for the version this claim supports.

schema.name: ExceedsOwningCadence
schema.Description: TRUE when this claim is older than the review cadence promised for the version it supports.

schema.name: IsAgingLowConfidenceClaim
schema.Description: TRUE when a claim we were never sure about has also outlived its version's review cadence.

schema.name: OwnerRoleAgentKind
schema.Description: Agent kind of whoever currently holds the role that owns this knowledge fragment.

schema.name: IsHumanOwned
schema.Description: TRUE when the owning role is currently held by a human.

schema.name: IsAiValidatedByAi
schema.Description: TRUE when knowledge came from a non-human source AND is owned by a non-human-held role.

schema.name: ReviewCadenceDays
schema.Description: The review cadence promised for the procedure version this fragment supports, resolved via ProcedureVersions because INDEX/MATCH only matches a target primary key.

schema.name: IsOverdueForReview
schema.Description: TRUE when a currently-valid fragment has gone longer than its stewardship cadence without review.

schema.name: PredatesCurrentRoleHolder
schema.Description: TRUE when this knowledge became valid before the current holder of its owning role took the role.

schema.name: OwnerRoleAssignmentValidFrom
schema.Description: When the current holder of the owning role took that role.

schema.name: LastReviewedAt
schema.Description: When this fragment was last actually reviewed and reaffirmed by its owning role. Null when it has never been reviewed since authoring. IsOverdueForReview infers recency from ValidFrom, which records when the claim became TRUE, not when anyone last looked at it. Those are different events, and the inference is deliberately left in place under its own name rather than silently rewritten to fall back on this column.

schema.name: FragilitySignalCount
schema.Description: How many of the four loop-1 decay signals are simultaneously true for this fragment: single witness, overdue for review, low confidence, operational reliance.

schema.name: IsCompoundFragile
schema.Description: A fragment carrying at least three of the four decay signals at once.

schema.name: IsSinglePointOfFailure
schema.Description: A claim that rests on exactly one person's word and that an active exception handler actually routes cases against.

schema.name: IsExpiringSinglePointOfFailure
schema.Description: A single-sourced, operationally relied-upon claim that is also past its review date.

schema.name: CompoundFragileVersionKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: this fragment's procedure version when the fragment is compound-fragile, blank otherwise.

schema.name: ValidFragmentSessionKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: the elicitation session behind this fragment when the fragment is currently valid, blank otherwise.

schema.name: ConsumingStepIsSoftwareAssigned
schema.Description: Whether the step that consumes this fragment is assigned to an AI agent or an automated pipeline.

schema.name: ConsumingStepAgentKind
schema.Description: The kind of agent currently holding the role assigned to the step that consumes this fragment.

schema.name: IsUnapprovedAndMachineConsumed
schema.Description: An unapproved claim that a software-assigned step actually relies on — executed literally, with no human in position to notice it is wrong.

schema.name: IsUnapprovedAndHumanConsumed
schema.Description: An unapproved claim relied on by a human-assigned step — a reviewable risk rather than a silent one.

schema.name: MachineConsumedUnapprovedVersionKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: this fragment's procedure version when the fragment is unapproved and machine-consumed, blank otherwise.

schema.name: HasReviewRecord
schema.Description: Whether this fragment has ever had an actual review recorded, as opposed to merely having a ValidFrom date.

schema.name: DaysSinceActualReview
schema.Description: Days elapsed since this fragment was last actually reviewed. Zero when no review has ever been recorded — read this only alongside HasReviewRecord, never on its own.

schema.name: IsUnreviewedSinceAuthoring
schema.Description: A currently-valid claim that nobody has ever reviewed since it was written.

schema.name: IsGenuinelyOverdue
schema.Description: A valid claim whose LAST ACTUAL REVIEW is older than the cadence its owning version promised.

schema.name: ReviewRecencyIsInferred
schema.Description: A fragment reported overdue by the loop-1 inference purely because no review has ever been recorded — the number is an artifact of missing data, not evidence of neglect.

schema.name: InferenceDisagreesWithRecord
schema.Description: A fragment the ValidFrom inference calls overdue but which was in fact reviewed inside its cadence — a false positive in the loop-1 predicate, now provable.

schema.name: GenuinelyOverdueVersionKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: this fragment's procedure version when the fragment is genuinely overdue, blank otherwise.

schema.name: RatifiedBoundaryCount
schema.Description: How many currently-binding authority boundaries this fragment ratifies.

schema.name: RelianceSurfaceCount
schema.Description: Total number of distinct downstream dependents on this claim: exception handlers plus ratified authority boundaries.

schema.name: DaysAwaitingMyApproval
schema.Description: How long a claim of mine has been sitting at Reviewed without my approval. Zero when the claim is not mine or is already decided.

schema.name: IsHighBlastRadiusUnapproved
schema.Description: An unapproved, operationally live claim of mine with more than one distinct downstream dependent.

schema.name: IsLongUnapproved
schema.Description: A claim that has waited on my signature for more than thirty days.

schema.name: UnapprovedLoadBearingVersionKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: this fragment's procedure version when it is a high-blast-radius unapproved claim, blank otherwise.

schema.name: OwnerRoleIsVacated
schema.Description: Whether the role that owns this claim is currently vacated.

schema.name: IsOrphanedByRole
schema.Description: A currently-valid claim whose owning role nobody holds — accountable to a vacancy.

schema.name: ValidFragmentVersionKey
schema.Description: Composite-key echo: this fragment's owning procedure version when the fragment is currently valid, blank otherwise.

schema.name: SemanticTypeIri
schema.Description: Extension class IRI.

data.Statement: When FX variance spikes near a daylight-saving cutover, compare each feed's source timestamp before investigating economics.
The controller normally reviews the ten largest unexplained variances even when each is below the individual materiality threshold.
Close evidence is retained for seven years and must remain linked to the execution that produced it.
Escalate a variance when its pattern is anomalous or recurring, even if the net amount is below the numeric threshold.
AI may draft from approved sources but may not create new legal commitments or approve meaning.
Employees respond faster to concise SMS notices, but disputes are resolved against the complete approved email and policy record.
When an employee is unreachable for 48 hours, the communications team normally routes a case to the employee's manager.

KnowledgeGaps.Description: Known unknowns and missing procedural coverage. Explicit ERB-PKO extension used to govern scope and prevent silent incompleteness.

schema.name: KnowledgeGapId

schema.name: OwnerRole

schema.name: IdentifiedAt

schema.name: ResolutionPlan

schema.name: OpenGapVersionKey

schema.name: IsBlocking

schema.name: IsOpenAndBlocking

schema.name: EvaluationContext

schema.name: AsOfInstant

schema.name: ToleranceDays

schema.name: IsOverdueGap

schema.name: OwnerAgent

schema.name: OwnerIsStillEngaged
